title: Day-05: Tarmoq asoslari — ip, ss, dns, curl

tasks.prompt: Serveringning birinchi IP manzilini 'ip.txt' ga yoz (hostname -I yoki ip a — buyruq bilan).
'cloudflare.com' domenini IP ga aylantirib 'dns.txt' ga yoz (getent / nslookup / dig).
https://example.com ga so'rov yuborib, javob HEADER'larini 'resp.txt' ga yoz (curl -sI). Ichида HTTP javob qatori bo'lsin.
SSH xizmati standart qaysi portда ishlaydi? Faqat raqamni 'sshport.txt' ga yoz.
